title: Limace-UB Re-texture
description: Limace-UB model By DelphhoxOTS resourcepack maker by: Rekon
body:
For this resource pack to work properly, please download the original resource pack from the discord server: SMTR Discord Server. The latest versions also require the rekon sound library.
# Including
1. Skoda Varsovia From Limace-UB (by: Unknown)
2. Elizabeth Line Class H (by: noot)
3. SKM Lisiewo Trajka (by: Rekon)
4. SKM Lisiewo Blu (by: Rekon)
### MTR4 Only
